channel.title: Tools on Tony De La Nuez
channel.description: Recent content in Tools on Tony De La Nuez

item.title: vx
item.description:
vx

An offline dictation tool for macOS weighing in at 71mb.

download latest release here

While working it’s felt like a lot of the lag in my workflows has been due to typing. Even after optimizing my keyboard setup, the ability for my fingers to keep up with my brain was slowing me down.

I looked into voice to text tools, but all the popular ones at the time sent data over the wire, which wasn’t really an option. So I built one that didn’t.
